input.prompt:
Find all BUCK targets that use python_unittest in fbcode/common/. List the BUCK file paths and target names.

1. The full path to the BUCK file
2. The target name(s) defined with python_unittest

Use the search_files tool with appropriate patterns to find BUCK files containing python_unittest in the fbcode/common/ directory.

state.title: Find all BUCK files with python_unittest

input.command: find fbcode/common -name "BUCK" -type f -exec grep -l "python_unittest" {} \; | while read file; do echo "=== $file ==="; grep -A 1 "python_unittest(" "$file" | grep "name\s*=" | sed "s/.*name\s*=\s*[\"']\([^\"']*\)[\"'].*/\1/"; done
